# RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.Union

**Device Management Command**

A dictionary that contains unioned restrictions.

## Declaration

```swift
object RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.Union
```

## Objects

- **RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.Union.ANY restriction name**: A dictionary that contains unioned restriction parameters.

## Objects

- **RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.Intersection**: A dictionary that contains intersected restrictions.
- **RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.RestrictedBool**: A dictionary that contains Boolean restrictions.
- **RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions.ANY profile identifier.RestrictedValue**: A dictionary that contains numeric restrictions.
